title: Trump says Iran 'better stop now' if it's charging oil tankers fees to go through Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: President Donald Trump said that Iran "better stop now" if it's charging fees to oil tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: President Donald Trump said that Iran "better stop now" if it's charging fees to oil tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz.
